lines.text: Ugh, the crops are all dead.
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: Grandpa's notes mentioned the soil was too salty, but the pages with the solution got ruined during the TD Outbreak. If only Grandpa had lived longer...
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: Don't be so ungrateful. If it wasn't for the Sentinel's help, our fleet would have been wiped out.
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: From here on out, we must rely on ourselves. If one generation can't do it, we'll try with two. The land of Rinascita will be fertile again, I know it!
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow
